chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3390 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A 19742/16 3. For hearing of main case 23.01.2019 This petition was filed on 06.12.2016 and was taken up for the first time on 04.12.2018 when no one was present and the case was adjourned with the direction to the Counsel for the petitioner to satisfy the court about the maintainability of this petition. Thereafter, the mater has been fixed today but again no one is present, which reflects that the petitioner has no intention to proceed with the matter, which is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
